session.assistant:
**Phase 7: Run CI**
There's one potential issue — the header pattern `r"^\s+\[([^\]]+)\]$"` in the test might also match `[project]` or `[user]` scope labels that appear in capability lines. Let me check the format of capability lines more carefully.
The capability line format is: ``` ✓ code-reviews-system [project] GitHub Actions infrastructure... ```
The scope label `[project]` appears inline in the capability line (not on its own line), so the `$` anchor in `^\s+\[([^\]]+)\]$` ensures it only matches lines where `[...]` is the only content. That should work correctly.
However, the `" [Code Reviews]"` header line — does `[project]` in the capability line regex `\[\w+\]` match `[Code Reviews]`? No, because "Code Reviews" has a space which isn't `\w`. Good.
Let me run the tests now:

tool_use.param:

session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's a summary of what was implemented:
**PR #9220 submitted**: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/9220
**Changes made:**
1. **`src/erk/core/capabilities/base.py`** — Added `tag: str | None` property to `Capability` ABC (returns `None` by default)
2. **`src/erk/core/capabilities/review_capability.py`** — Added `tag` override returning `"code-reviews"` on `ReviewCapability` base class (inherited by all 3 review subclasses)
3. **Individual capability files** — Added `tag` property overrides to: - `code_reviews_system.py` → `"code-reviews"` - `agents/devrun.py` → `"devrun"` - `reminders/devrun.py` → `"devrun"` - `reminders/dignified_python.py` → `"dignified-python"` - `reminders/explore_docs.py` → `"documentation"` - `reminders/tripwires.py` → `"documentation"` - `learned_docs.py` → `"documentation"`
4. **`src/erk/capabilities/skills/bundled.py`** — Added `_BUNDLED_SKILL_TAGS` dict, added `_tag` parameter to `BundledSkillCapability`, and updated `create_bundled_skill_capabilities()` to pass tags for `dignified-code-simplifier`, `gh`, and `gt`
5. **`src/erk/cli/commands/init/capability/list_cmd.py`** — Rewrote `_check_all()` to use `itertools.groupby` for grouped display with headers, extracted `_render_capability_line()` helper, added `TAG_DISPLAY_NAMES` dict, widened name column to 35 chars
6. **`tests/unit/cli/commands/init/capability/test_list_cmd.py`** — Replaced `test_capability_list_sorts_alphabetically` with `test_capability_list_sorts_alphabetically_within_groups`, added `test_capability_list_shows_group_headers`
